title: World cup Esim from Visible for US, Canada and Mex
body:
O.P.
this post was edited
I needed an esim that would give data and a US number. These plans are specific for the world cup period. I've just signed up (use FIFA10 for $10 discount)
https://www.visible.com/travel-data-pass
Unlimited call and text with 2gb data a day and then throttled (inside the 3 countries). Looks like depending on the plan you get this will include calling back home as well. For my 30 day plan:
"+300 min. of Regional outbound Intl. calling" that also includes unlimited texting back to Aus.
I used our US hotel for the address. Esim installed and ready and I can see my US number in the profile.
Unlimited premium data on Verizon’s 5G Ultra Wideband network Requires 5G Ultra Wideband access and a capable device inside the 5G Ultra Wideband coverage area.
Unlimited talk & text to/from CAN & MEX plus 2GB data in CAN & MEX Unlimited talk and text within the U.S., unlimited talk and text from the U.S. to Mexico & Canada and unlimited talk and text from Mexico & Canada to the U.S. After 2 GB/day of data, speeds reduced to 3G
Unlimited texting to 200+ countries Up to 4K UHD quality video Streaming quality up to 4K when using 5G Ultra Wideband network on a capable device, or up to 1080p when on 5G or LTE.
